diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I bought the Welkin Moon twice in the same day by accident. Can I get one of them refunded?
[Agent] Sure, what's your UID?
[Caller] 803990456.
[Agent] I see the account. The last order is ORD202604150002 for 4.99 USD on April 15th. I only see one Welkin order on the account though. Were both purchases on this UID?
[Caller] Yes, I made two purchases back to back. Let me check the email receipts. Oh wait, one of them might have been on my husband's UID on the same day.
[Agent] That would explain it. Do you have the other UID?
[Caller] No, I don't know his UID off the top of my head.
[Agent] Without the second UID I can't run get_order_status on the duplicate purchase. Also, I want to flag, I'm not actually sure what our policy is on refunding a Welkin Moon that's already been activated versus one that hasn't. I don't have clear policy guidance on that scenario.
[Caller] So you can't tell me if I'm even eligible?
[Agent] Not with confidence, no. I'd recommend either calling back with your husband's UID, or I can transfer you to a specialist who can advise on the Welkin duplicate-purchase policy.
[Caller] Ugh, fine. Transfer me I guess.
[Agent] One moment, connecting you to our Billing team now.
escalation_reason: Unable to advise on Welkin Moon duplicate-purchase refund policy
